# PuzzleHub — Free Online Brain Games & Logic Puzzles
> https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/
PuzzleHub is a high-performance Progressive Web Application (PWA) delivering 9 free interactive brain games and logic puzzles with offline support, daily global challenges, and local progress tracking.
## Core Features & Capabilities
- **Zero Signup Requirement**: Play instantly in any modern web browser or mobile PWA.
- **Offline Mode**: Powered by Service Worker Stale-While-Revalidate caching for seamless offline gameplay.
- **Inclusive Accessibility**: Full keyboard navigation, ARIA live regions, high-contrast dark/light themes, and WCAG AAA tap targets (>= 44px).
## Included Game Suite
1. **Sudoku** (/#/game/sudoku): Classic 9x9 logic grid solver with 4 difficulty tiers, candidate pencil notes, conflict alerts, and hint engine.
2. **Crossword** (/#/game/crossword): Interactive word puzzle matrix with Across & Down clue navigation.
3. **Word Search** (/#/game/wordsearch): Dynamic letter grid generator with 8-directional vector line selection.
4. **2048** (/#/game/2048): 4x4 matrix tile merger with swipe and keyboard control handlers.
5. **Memory Match** (/#/game/memory): Card pair shuffle matching game with move counts and timer.
6. **Kakuro** (/#/game/kakuro): Cross-sum mathematical logic grid with split clue-cells.
7. **Nonogram** (/#/game/nonogram): Picross picture logic matrix with 3-state cell toggling.
8. **Cryptogram** (/#/game/cryptogram): Alphabet substitution cipher decoder with quote collection.
9. **Minesweeper** (/#/game/minesweeper): Safe-first-click minefield clearing engine with flag toggling.
## Key Sitemap Directives
- Sitemap XML: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/sitemap.xml
- Primary Entry: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/
- Privacy Policy: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/privacy-policy
- Contact: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/contact
- Robots: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/robots.txt
- Manifest: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/manifest.json
- Source: https://github.com/Mindgame786/puzzle-hub-games
